evaluation_protocol.one_shot_prompt_contract: The public spec exposes the module interface, public harness, aperture-delay behavior, held-output behavior, and voltage-domain constraints without revealing checker internals.
evaluation_protocol.feedback_track_note: A future feedback/debug track should reuse task assets only under a separate runner protocol and separate pass@K score table.

notes: Public prompt is now a thin task wrapper; public/agent_visible_spec.md is the shared agent-visible behavior contract.
Public spec removes checker IDs and private checker sample windows.
Public testbench is copied into v2 public/support so the task is self-contained.
Private checker policy is behavior-first; it does not require private variable names or a specific implementation template.

private_diagnostics.private_sample_policy: Compare delayed aperture vin samples against settled vout samples after each clock edge.
private_diagnostics.gold_expectation: The private gold DUT schedules sampling at $abstime + taperture on rising clock edges.

private_checker_contract.public_behavior_envelope: The public spec specifies a 200 ps aperture delay after each rising clock transition, delayed capture of vin rather than edge-time capture, held vout between delayed samples, broad held-level coverage, and smooth voltage-domain output transitions.
private_checker_contract.implementation_constraints: No private variable names, exact timer variable names, or fixed implementation template are required by the v2 checker.

directive: This release task card is private benchmark/evaluator metadata. Do not render it into agent prompts.
